reply_content: Do you think during Merlinos reign he was close to as powerful as Little Nicky Scarfo was or do you think by the time of the Stanfa v Merlino war do to aggressive prosecution under the RICO ACT made it impossible for even intelligent gangsters like Joey Merlino to reach the same level of power because of the national hit the mafia had endured since the beginning of to 90s? My opinion is Scarfo was a worse boss than Merlino examples of this is letting your ego get to the point where you have completely loyal men killed for gaining fame “Sal Testa” with that being said I do believe that Scarfo held more power during his bloody reign especially having a close relationship with the Genovese family and their boss the chin, who regardless of what the media portrayed was the most powerful boss in New York and the Genovese family most likely surpassed the Gambino family because of Gotti and his inept leadership. Merlino was capable of being a better tactical leader than Little Nicky he was just a little too young to reach the top of the mountain before the drastic decline in mafia influence through out the country, both bosses had internal family wars Stanfa v Merlino and over a decade earlier Scarfo v the hunchback Harry Riccobene. I always like to hear other peoples opinions and why they feel that way, so I’m open to hearing any opinions whether they agree or disagree with my own view.
